zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Pateshull於大約1335年出生時，她的父親Sir John De Pateshull45歲，母親Mabilia Grandison43歲。她於1354年6月14日與Thomas Wake結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1398年8月10日之後在英國英格蘭貝德福爾布勒左，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Pateshull于大约1335年出生时，她的父亲Sir John De Pateshull45岁，母亲Mabilia Grandison43岁。她于1354年6月14日与Thomas Wake结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1398年8月10日之后在英国英格兰貝德福爾布勒左，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾馬可特 迪平。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Pateshull was born about 1335, her father, Sir John De Pateshull, was 45 and her mother, Mabilia Grandison, was 43. She married Thomas Wake on 14 June 1354. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 10 August 1398, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Pateshull est née environ 1335, son père, Sir John De Pateshull, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mabilia Grandison, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wake le 14 juin 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 10 août 1398, à Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Pateshull um 1335 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John De Pateshull 45 und ihre Mutter Mabilia Grandison 43. Sie hat am 14. Juni 1354 Thomas Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 10. August 1398 in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pateshull è nata il circa 1335, sua padre, Sir John De Pateshull, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Mabilia Grandison, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wake il 14 giugno 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 10 agosto 1398, nel Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Pateshullが約1335年に生まれた時，父Sir John De Pateshullは45歳，母Mabilia Grandisonは43歳であった。1354年6月14日にThomas Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1398年8月10日以後にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアブレトソで死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアマーケト ディーパングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Pateshull(이)가 대략 1335년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John De Pateshull(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabilia Grandison(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1354년 6월 14일 Thomas Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 8월 10일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 마크트 디핀그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pateshull nasceu aproximadamente 1335, seu pai, Sir John De Pateshull, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mabilia Grandison, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wake em 14 de junho de 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 10 de agosto de 1398, em Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Pateshull родилась около 1335 г., её отцу по имени Sir John De Pateshull было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabilia Grandison, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wake 14 июня 1354 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 10 августа 1398 г. в местности блецо, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности маркет дипинг, линколншир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1335–Aft 10 August 1398: e tusa o le 1335–ina ua ma'ea le 10 Aukuso 1398

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Pateshull nació aproximadamente 1335, su papá, Sir John De Pateshull, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mabilia Grandison, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Thomas Wake el 14 de junio de 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 10 de agosto de 1398, en Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
